meta.summary: Protenix 2.0.0 inference and preprocessing runtime for biomolecular structure prediction, with explicit model-cache helpers and NVIDIA GPU support.
meta.description: Protenix 2.0.0 inference and preprocessing runtime for biomolecular structure prediction, with explicit model-cache helpers and NVIDIA GPU support.

test: protenix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'pred' >/dev/null && protenix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'json' >/dev/null && protenix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'prep' >/dev/null
protenix pred --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--model_name' >/dev/null && protenix pred --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--use_msa' >/dev/null

python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import torch, rdkit, biotite, gemmi, Bio, deepspeed, triton; assert md.version("protenix") == "2.0.0"; assert torch.__version__.startswith("2.7.1"); assert md.version("cuequivariance-torch") == "0.8.0"; assert md.version("cuequivariance-ops-torch-cu12") == "0.8.0"; dist = md.distribution("cuequivariance-ops-cu12"); assert dist.version == "0.8.0"; assert any(str(path).endswith("cuequivariance_ops/lib/libcue_ops.so") for path in dist.files)'
for command in hmmsearch hmmbuild jackhmmer nhmmer hmmalign; do "$command" -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null || exit 1; done; kalign --version 2>&1 | grep -E '[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' >/dev/null

protenix-download-assets --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Download Protenix model and common assets' >/dev/null && protenix-download-assets --dry-run 2>&1 | grep -F 'checkpoint/protenix_base_default_v1.0.0.pt' >/dev/null && protenix-download-assets --list-models 2>&1 | grep -F 'protenix-v2' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-protenix-assets-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if protenix-check-assets --data-root "$tmp" >"$tmp/check.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/check.log" >&2; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'Protenix asset cache is incomplete' "$tmp/check.log" >/dev/null; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

tmp=/tmp/taf-protenix-guard-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; if PROTENIX_ROOT_DIR="$tmp" protenix pred -i "$tmp/missing.json" -o "$tmp/out" >"$tmp/pred.log" 2>&1; then cat "$tmp/pred.log" >&2; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit 1; fi; grep -F 'refusing an implicit network download' "$tmp/pred.log" >/dev/null; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

tmp=/tmp/taf-protenix-json-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; PROTENIX_ROOT_DIR=/opt/protenix/share/testdata protenix json --input /opt/protenix/share/testdata/tiny.pdb --out_dir "$tmp"; test -s "$tmp/tiny.json"; python -c 'import json, sys; data = json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data[0]["name"] == "tiny"; assert data[0]["sequences"][0]["ligand"]["ligand"] == "CCD_GLY"' "$tmp/tiny.json"; status=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit "$status"

upstream.name: Protenix
upstream.citation: Zhang Y, Gong C, Sun J, Guan J, Ren M, Xue S, Zhang H, Ma W, Liu Z, Chen X, Xiao W. Protenix-v2: Broadening the Reach of Structure Prediction and Biomolecular Design. bioRxiv. 2026.
